---
output: html_document
---

```{r, here-i-am}
here::i_am("subproject1/report.Rmd"
  #! TO DO: add appropriate location
)
```

# Descriptive Analysis

## Tabular analysis

Characteristics of the `r nrow(data)` viruses from the CATNAP database are displayed
in the table below.

```{r, table1}
readRDS(
  file = here::here("subproject1/output/table_one.rds")
  #! TO DO: add appropriate file path to read table 1
)
```

## Graphical analysis

Below we report a scatter plot of antibody resistance as a function of 
number of PNGs in the glycan shield. 

```{r, plot-data}
#| fig.align = "center",
#| out.width = "600px"
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("subproject1/output/scatter.png")
  #! TO DO: add appropriate file path to read scatter plot
)
```
